_comment: Client-side feature flags. Each flag is { enabled: bool, launchAt: ISO-8601-UTC string or null }. A flag is ON if enabled===true, OR if launchAt is set and that UTC time is now in the past. This file IS deployed (it lives in src/), so treat it as PUBLIC — never gate anything secret on a client flag; use it for soft reveals only. See src/flags.js for the helper and SCHEDULED-RELEASES.md for usage.
